user.title: Connect to DeyeCloud
user.description: Enter your DeyeCloud account and developer application credentials. Documentation: {documentation_url}

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate DeyeCloud
reauth_confirm.description: Your DeyeCloud credentials are no longer valid. Update them to continue.

reauth.title: Re-authenticate DeyeCloud
reauth.description: Your DeyeCloud credentials are no longer valid. Update them to continue.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure DeyeCloud
reconfigure.description: Update your DeyeCloud account or API credentials.

station_select.title: Select stations
station_select.description: Choose which DeyeCloud stations to load into Home Assistant.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check your credentials and app keys.
error.no_stations_found: Authentication succeeded but no stations were found.
error.no_stations_selected: Select at least one station to load.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while connecting to DeyeCloud.
error.station_not_found: The selected station could not be found.

abort.already_configured: This DeyeCloud account is already configured.
abort.all_stations_configured: All stations from your account are already configured.

stations.title: Select stations
stations.description: Choose which DeyeCloud stations to load into Home Assistant.

user.title: Add station
user.description: Select a DeyeCloud station to expose as a sub-entry.

abort.station_not_found: The selected station could not be found.

auth_failed.title: DeyeCloud authentication failed
auth_failed.description: The integration could not authenticate with DeyeCloud. Re-authenticate to restore monitoring.

api_unavailable.title: DeyeCloud API unavailable
api_unavailable.description: The integration could not reach DeyeCloud: {error}

no_stations_found.message: No stations found for this account.
